description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, brand name and logo embroidered on the left chest and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water below 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations This sporty white T-shirt from adidas is the answer to upping your casual style. The contrast graphic print looks great, making you stand out in a crowd with ease! And forget about sweat as the soft comfortable polyester fabric keep you fresh all through the day. Pair it with jeans, shorts or tracks for a great look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulder 18&rdquo
